meaning: 迚ｹ驥梧勸諡蛾え[蜊ｰ蠎ｦ驍ｦ蜷江
examples: In India, Bangla is mainly spoken across the states of West Bengal and Tripura.
Children take part in celebrations to mark Janmashtami in Agartala, capital of India's northeastern state of Tripura.
Police in India's north-eastern state of Tripura say at least 14 people have been killed in a separatist attack.
The merger of two tribal parties in the north-eastern Indian state of Tripura has revived hopes of peace in the state.
The Bangladesh Meteorological Department said Cyclone Mahasen had weakened and had hit the Sitakunda and Feni regions of Bangladesh, adjoining India's Tripura state.
